OBJECTION TO TRIAL DATE SET BY THE COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT GENEREX BIOTECHNOLOGY CORPORATION
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CROSS DEFENDANT CARMEN CARICCHIO DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF EARLY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE - EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT CARMEN CARICCHIO DBA COACTIVE PUBLIC RELATIONS DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FACTS PRESENTED DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT GENEREX HAS ENGAGED IN INTRASTATE BUSINESS AS CONSTRASTED WITH CONTACTS SUFFICIENT TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION OVER A PARTY. SPORADIC AND TRANSIENT SALES ACTIVITIES ARE NOT SUFFICIENT. LEVECKE V. GRIESEDIECK WESTERN BREWING CO. (9TH CIR. 1956) 233 F. 2ND 772, 776. SEE ALSO WEST PUBLISHING CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1942) 20 C. 2ND 720, 727-28; MARTIN BROS. ELEC. CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1953) 121 CAL.APP.2D 790. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

CROSS DEFENDANT CARMEN CARICCHIO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 PER JUDGE BUSCH RECUSAL. MATTER STILL SET FOR HEARING ON NOVEMBER 20, 2008. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/ER

Cross Defendant Carmen Caricchio Demurrer To Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Carmen Caricchio dba CoActive Public Relations Demurrer To Cross-Complaint.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED. THE FACTS PRESENTED DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT GENEREX HAS ENGAGED IN INTRASTATE BUSINESS AS CONSTRASTED WITH CONTACTS SUFFICIENT TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION OVER A PARTY. SPORADIC AND TRANSIENT SALES ACTIVITIES ARE NOT SUFFICIENT. LEVECKE V. GRIESEDIECK WESTERN BREWING CO. (9TH CIR. 1956) 233 F. 2ND 772, 776. SEE ALSO WEST PUBLISHING CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1942) 20 C. 2ND 720, 727-28; MARTIN BROS. ELEC. CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1953) 121 CAL.APP.2D 790. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/ER) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
